issue: All the data saved in the data folder of this app has the geographic coordinate data loaded, but the 'schematic' data is currently empty. Id like to revise these five data files so that the user can view the system as a clean network schematic (no geographic coordinates) if they want to. This would be actuated when the user choses the 2D-SCH mode in the 2x2 switch at the bottom-right of the App window. For now, I'd like you to review the data closely and think about how you would add schematic coordinates to the data files. I'd like the nodes to appear on a regularly-spaced grid, and the pipes appearing as either straight or L-lines to connect those nodes, almost like a circuit diagram. I'd like reservoirs and overflow to appear as basic squares at the terminal points of this diagram. This about this hard and let me know if you have any questions or ideas before you make any changes.
